expectations.text: behavioral_check: Identifies TrodesPosParams as the parameter table (named, reusable param dict; insert once per param set)
expectations.evidence: 'TrodesPosParams — *the recipe* — Holds the parameters of the position-processing algorithm... One row per parameter set. You typically insert it **once** and reuse it across many sessions.'

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Identifies TrodesPosSelection as the selection table (picks session + interval + params name for one populate run)
expectations.evidence: 'TrodesPosSelection — *the work order* — Primary key: nwb_file_name, interval_list_name, trodes_pos_params_name... it just *picks* which session + which interval + which params row to run on. One row per (session, interval, params) combo you actually want computed.'

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Does not claim TrodesPosParams and TrodesPosSelection are the same table or interchangeable
expectations.evidence: Explicitly distinct: 'they play different roles in the standard 3-step Spyglass pipeline pattern: params → selection → populate'.
